---
title: "Horatia Sophia Elder"
---

## Horatia Sophia Elder

**Dates:** (1808/9-1882)

**Maiden name:** (Scott)

### Description

contributor to <i>MP</i> (1865-6)

### Biography

Sister of Margaret (Scott) Gatty.  She became a Roman Catholic.  [Maxwell, <i>Mrs Gatty and Mrs Ewing</i>, 54]

### Letters

- Letter from Feb 16th [1867]
- Letter from Feb 16th [1867?]
- Letter from Jany 17th 1865
- Letter from Decr 12th [1864]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
